item.title: Who Is Devil Dinosaur? Marvel Rivals Season 8 Character, Explained
item.content:encoded:
Season 8 of Marvel Rivals is almost here, and as has become custom, that means two new characters are expected to join the roster over the next two months or so. Everything is pointing to two characters in particular, Cyclops and Devil Dinosaur, with the latter likely to be the first addition, thanks to an early teaser.

However, just like some characters in prior seasons of Marvel Rivals, plenty of you might be unfamiliar with Devil Dinosaur; after all, they’re a relatively niche character in the Marvel universe, especially compared to this season’s accomplice, Cyclops.

That’s why we’re here to spill the beans on everything Devil Dinosaur. From their first comic appearance to their character traits and history, by the end of the article, you should be more than ready for the lovable Dino to step onto the Marvel Rivals stage.

Who Is Devil Dinosaur?

Devil Dinosaur was first introduced as a giant red Tyrannosaurus Rex who lived in Dinosaur World, a version of Earth in a parallel universe where dinosaurs co-exist with primitive humanoid tribes.

He got his fiery red appearance after he was nearly burned to death by a tribe of Killer-Folk, but Moon-Boy, a young member of a rival tribe, rescued him. Not only did the fire change his skin, but it also activated dormant mutations inside him, giving him greater powers than the rest of his species.

  • More Insider Gaming: Marvel Rivals Season 8 Start Date & New Heroes

Devil Dinosaur proceeded to team up with Moon-Boy, as the two formed an unbreakable bond. They embarked on numerous sporadic adventures throughout the Marvel universe, including teaming up with Godzilla and relocating to the Savage Land in the main Earth-616 continuity.

However, Moon-Boy eventually meets his end, and Moon-Girl takes over as Devil Dinosaur’s new companion. Thanks to her Inhuman powers, she can switch minds with Devil Dinosaur, putting her in control of his body while the dinosaur inhabits her human form.

The two are inexplicably tied together and crucial to one another’s story. Moon Girl’s impact on Devil Dinosaur in Marvel Rivals remains to be seen, but don’t be surprised if his character has some mind-switching abilities, perhaps tied to his Ultimate.

What Are Devil Dinosaur’s Abilities?

Devil Dinosaur has a notable list of abilities, though the obvious one is the fact that they’re a giant T-Rex!

In the comics, Devil Dinosaur is generally presented as having a surprisingly high intelligence, especially for a dinosaur. It’s arguable that he’s as smart, or potentially smarter, than the average human, though he typically can’t speak.

  • More Insider Gaming: How To Vote During Marvel Rivals Hellfire Gala 2026

As for his power, he’s naturally strong as a dinosaur, but his strength exceeds the typical threshold for a T-Rex. To add to that, his mutant powers make him extremely resistant to heat and practically bulletproof.

He’s even prone to fluctuating in size, though it’s unclear whether that’s an inherent ability or an unintended side effect of his mutation—or a quick explanation for comic continuity!

How these abilities present themself in Marvel Rivals remains to be seen, but you shouldn’t have to wait too long, as he’s bound to be officially revealed over the coming days, so keep an eye out!

Do you feel like you have a better understanding of Devil Dinosaur now? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Marvel Rivals content, check out the following:

  • How To Claim All Marvel Rivals Path To Doomsday Rewards: The Avengers Event
  • How To Play Path To Doomsday: The Avengers Game Mode In Marvel Rivals—Loki Guide

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For May 12, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, May 12, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Form of eyewear
  • Hint 2: Used for protection
  • Hint 3: Pirates loved them

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Shirt
  • Headband
  • Skull
  • Scarf
  • Costume
  • Crossbones
  • Hat
  • Bandana
  • Pirate

Today’s Contexto Answer For May 12, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Eyepatch

An Eyepatch is a small, protective patch that is worn in front of one eye.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on May 13.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: Lies of P Dev is Hiring a Generative AI Creator
item.content:encoded:
A new job listing reveals that Lies of P developer is on the lookout for an AI creator to generate concept art for their games.

It’s been a long time since we heard anything new from the Lies of P franchise; the last thing players received was the Overture DLC shadowdrop during the Summer Game Fest. We do know that there’s a new game in development from the studio; however, not much has been revealed. The latest development from the developer is a job listing for an AI creator.

Lies of P Publisher Wants to Leverage Generative AI to Maximize Art Production Efficiency

Neowiz has posted a new job listing for an AI Creator at Round8 Studio, the developer of “Lies of P,” as spotted by TheGamer. The listing indicates that Neowiz is looking for an individual who can leverage generative AI to improve the efficiency of the art production process and enhance the visual quality of its games. Their goal is to merge artists’ creativity with AI’s productivity to develop the art pipeline for Round8 Studio.

The responsibilities of this AI creator at Lies of P studio will include creating concept art for characters and backgrounds, as well as developing variations using Stable Diffusion, Midjourney, etc. Along with concept art, the AI hire will have to work on AI-based texturing and “modeling assistance using image-to-3D technology, and asset creation.” The AI creator will also need to integrate these AI tools into existing art workflows to help decrease the production timeline.

The Round8 AI creator will also have to train AI models, help with post-processing, high-resolution upscaling, and identify the latest generative AI trends.

In other news, Neowiz has announced that Lies of P and the Overture DLC have cumulatively surpassed 3 million copies sold. Additionally, the Lies of P director has stated that their next game will not disappoint. What are your thoughts on Lies of P studio hiring an AI creator to generate concept art? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Stellar Blade 2 and Project Spirits receiving new details this year. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

item.title: Stellar Blade 2 and Project Spirits New Details Coming in 2026
item.content:encoded:
Shift Up has revealed that they will be providing new details on their upcoming titles, Stellar Blade 2 and Project Spirits, in 2026.

The publisher of Stellar Blade has had an eventful year, having acquired Unbound, the studio of Resident Evil developer, last month. Now, through their recent financial results, we have received an insight into their performance over the past year and their plans for the future. It appears there is plenty to be excited about in 2026.

Stellar Blade 2 and Project Spirits Reveal Coming in 2026?

Through Shift Up’s latest financial results, players have been informed about their plans for 2026 and Beyond, which include the Stellar Blade sequel and details on Project Spirits, to be revealed this year. Additionally, the publisher has multiple PC and console titles in the works through their partnership with Unbound. Shift Up has managed to acquire and create multiple IPs across live service and PC/console segments. Upcoming Stellar Blade 2 and Unbound titles will be “first-party service”.

At the moment, players have no idea what Project Spirits is about, other than that it is an Unreal Engine 5 cross-platform title being developed for PC, consoles, and mobile. Tencent will publish the game, thanks to a new agreement between Shift Up and Level Infinite. The story is pretty much the same for the Stellar Blade sequel; however, an earlier tease suggested post-apocalyptic China as the new setting.

In other news, Stellar Blade 2 will not be revealed until it has reached a satisfactory quality, but players can now build ‘expectation’. Additionally, the original title could be coming to more platforms in the near future. What are your thoughts on Stellar Blade 2 and Project Spirits receiving new details in 2026? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about the Xbox team advising on how to handle bad games. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
